function.name: speak
function.description: Speak text aloud through the robot's speakers using Piper TTS. Use for any verbal response.

function.name: describe_scene
function.description: Take a fresh camera snapshot and describe what the robot sees. Use when asked about surroundings or visual questions.

focus.description: Optional focus area or object to pay attention to in the scene.

function.name: remember
function.description: Store a fact in persistent memory. The robot will recall this in future conversations.

key.description: A short label for the memory (e.g. 'user_name', 'favorite_color').

function.name: get_time
function.description: Get the current date and time. Use when asked about time or date.

function.name: set_reminder
function.description: Set a timed reminder. The robot will speak the message after the specified delay.

delay_seconds.description: How many seconds from now to trigger the reminder.

function.name: gpio_signal
function.description: Control GPIO pins for physical actions: LEDs, motors (wheels), servos, or relays.

duration_ms.description: Optional: auto-reset pin after this many milliseconds.

function.name: move
function.description: Move the robot forward or backward using the wheel motors.

duration_ms.description: How long to move in milliseconds. Default 1000.
